source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A square loop with side length \( l \) is carrying a current \( I \) in two different configurations as shown in the image (where \( ab \) and \( cd \) are in the plane of the square). In these two cases, the magnitudes of the magnetic induction at the center of the loop are respectively:
